# docs(benefits): rename Introduction.md → ApplicationEngine.md + demote from main intro

Part of #14310 (Documentation & learning-experience overhaul). Refs #14310.

## Problem
`learn/benefits/Introduction.md` ("The Application Engine for the AI Era") is solid content *as a Body / engine doc* — but it currently serves as the **main intro**, so a first-time reader meets a Body-only, pre-v13 framing (no Brain / Agent OS / cloud). The content should be **kept, renamed, and demoted** under the Body-benefits group; the new comprehension-first main intro is authored separately (sibling sub under #14310).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `learn/benefits/Introduction.md` renamed to `learn/benefits/ApplicationEngine.md`, content preserved (light freshness only — correct "four MCP servers" → 5+, soften Gemini-only embedding framing to local-or-remote — WITHOUT expanding into a rewrite).
- [ ] `learn/tree.json` updated: the renamed doc sits under the **Body (Application Engine)** benefits group per the #14310 IA, no longer the first/main `Benefits` entry.
- [ ] All inbound links updated to the new id (grep `benefits/Introduction` across `learn/`, `README.md`, and the portal app).
- [ ] The main-intro nav slot is filled by the new-intro sub (coordinate sequencing — do not leave a dangling/empty front-door entry).

## Files
`learn/benefits/Introduction.md` → `learn/benefits/ApplicationEngine.md`, `learn/tree.json`, inbound links.

## Sequencing
Depends on the IA-restructure sub (the Body-benefits group must exist) and pairs with the new-main-intro sub.
